description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a brown gable roof and white exterior walls, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns. The property includes a detached garage, a paved driveway, and a spacious backyard with a wooden deck and a shaded gazebo area surrounded by palm trees. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, providing ample natural light. The backyard is enclosed by a low wall, and the landscaping includes a mix of paved surfaces and greenery. The main entryway is accentuated by steps leading up to the porch, with decorative railings and a covered overhang. The overall design blends traditional and Mediterranean influences, creating a welcoming suburban appearance.
description: A two-story white house with a brown gable roof, front porch, detached garage, and a landscaped backyard with a deck and gazebo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, steps, columns, and the detached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the backyard deck area with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, gazebo, large windows, and the enclosed garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, gazebo, and the side profile of the house and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows on front and rear facades
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with columns, steps, and decorative railings
